title: Geepas 1800W Hair Dryer – Powerful Hairdryer for Quick Drying for Frizz Free Shine with Cool Shot Function – Portable Elegant Hair Dryer with 2Speed & 2 Heat Settings & Concentrator – 2 Years Warranty
features: POWERFUL HAIRDRYER - It has compact design, powerful 1800W hair dryer delivers strong airflow for fast drying and efficient styling, even for curly hair or thick wavy hair. This hairdryer for women is lightweight & portable, giving you quick drying results with every use. Very suitable for home, travel and hair salon.
CONCENTRATOR NOZZLE FOR SMOOTH STYLING - The concentrator nozzle for smooth styling and helps you create a super sleek blow dry with a shine, your hair will look healthy with this dryer.

2 SPEED AND 2 TEMPERATURE SETTINGS - With variable heat & speed settings, you can tailor blow-dry to your hair type. Finish with the Cool Shot button for ultra-glossy tresses and a style that stays in place all day and night.

COOL SHOT FUNCTION, EASY STORAGE - It gives a cool blow to the hair and is very useful for setting a hairstyle in place. This makes your hairstyle last longer as it does not get dishevelled easily. Hang up hook for easy Storage.
description: Product Description POWERFUL PERFORMANCE It has compact design, powerful 1800W hair dryer delivers strong airflow for fast drying and efficient styling. ELEGENT CONCENTRATOR Direct the air where you need the most. EASY TO SLIDE BUTTON CONTROL With variable heat & speed settings, you can tailor blow-dry to your hair type. HANGING LOOP For convenient storage hanging loop also available. FRIZZ- FREE- SHINE Create a super sleek blow dry with a shine, your hair will look healthy with this dryer. FLEXIBILITY It gives a cool blow to the hair and is very useful for setting a hairstyle in place. EASY GRIP Sleek and sturdy handle is can easily carry and use. AIR INLET COVER The air filter cover protects the air filter, avoids being corroded by dirt.
